summary: Proof-worth registry entries owned by build-tooling.

entries.contract: Repo-mode builds are content-based, include identity-free privacy metadata in one direct swiftc link, prohibit every post-link mutation, preserve linker ad-hoc teamless aos identity, and require help as the first live launch after rebuild.
entries.worth: This protects the ADR 0023 managed-endpoint artifact and 137 stop boundary without touching the real repo-mode binary or macOS TCC state.
entries.command: bash tests/aos-after-build.sh && node --test tests/aos-build-attestation.test.mjs && bash tests/build-rebuild-policy.sh && bash tests/repo-runtime-link-metadata.sh
entries.guard: uses a temporary fake repo/toolchain and a disposable linker output; never reads, writes, or replaces live ./aos
